name: 万钧
bio: 万钧，以万钧之力横扫战场的铁匠战士。他以大锤为武器，以无尽的力量震慑敌人，是战场上最强壮的存在。
bio_en: Wanjun, a blacksmith warrior who sweeps the battlefield with immense force. He uses a greathammer as a weapon, intimidating enemies with endless strength.
story: 万钧，以万钧之力横扫战场的铁匠战士。他以大锤为武器，以无尽的力量震慑敌人，在战场上展现出令人叹为观止的破坏力。

skills.skill_description: 以大锤发动万钧一击，对目标造成大量伤害并使其击飞。冷却25秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Strike with the greathammer for a crushing blow, dealing massive damage and launching the target. Cooldown: 25s.

skills.skill_description: 以大锤猛击地面，造成范围伤害并使附近敌人眩晕。冷却28秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Slam the greathammer into the ground, dealing area damage and stunning nearby enemies. Cooldown: 28s.

skills.skill_description: 以铁壁之力守护自身，大幅提升伤害减免，并对攻击自身的敌人造成反弹伤害。持续15秒。怒气上限75000。
skills.skill_description_en: Protect yourself with iron wall power, greatly increasing damage reduction and reflecting damage to attacking enemies. Duration: 15s. Rage limit: 75000.

skills.skill_description: 以强化铁壁之力守护自身，大幅提升伤害减免，同时提升自身攻击力。持续15秒。怒气上限75000。
skills.skill_description_en: Protect yourself with enhanced iron wall power, greatly increasing damage reduction while boosting own attack. Duration: 15s. Rage limit: 75000.
